[[Help:Transclusion|Transclusion]] from template: ! scope="col" style="width: 40%;" | Involves ! scope="col" style="width: 20%;" | Correct name ! scope="col" style="width: 20%;" | Actual article name |- ! scope="row" | {{tlp|Italic title}} | Title in italics | ''To Kill a Mockingbird'' | [[:en:To Kill a Mockingbird|To Kill a Mockingbird]] |- ! scope="row" | {{tlp|Italic title|all{{=}}yes}} | Complete title in italics, including parentheses | ''Randall and Hopkirk (Deceased)'' | [[Randall and Hopkirk (Deceased)]] |- ! scope="row" | {{tlp|Italic title|string{{=}}Ally McBeal}} | Phrase of {{para|string}} in italics | List of ''Ally McBeal'' episodes | [[:en:List of Ally McBeal episodes|List of Ally McBeal episodes]] |- ! scope="row" | {{tlp|Italic title|all{{=}}yes|string{{=}}Fringe}} | Phrase of {{para|string}} in italics; also looks in parentheses | Peter (''Fringe'' episode) | [[Peter (Fringe episode)]] |- ! scope="row" | {{tlp|Italic disambiguation}} | Disambiguation in italics | The End (''Lost'') | [[The End (Lost)]] |- ! scope="row" | {{tlp|Lowercase title}} | Lowercase first character | eBay | [[:en:EBay|EBay]] |- ! scope="row" | {{tlp|Lowercase title|italic{{=}}yes}} | Lowercase first character and place title in italics, not including disambiguation | ''iCarly'' (soundtrack) | [[ICarly (soundtrack)]] |- ! scope="row" | {{tlp|Lowercase title|italic{{=}}yes|force{{=}}yes}} | Lowercase first character and place title in italics, including disambiguation | | |- ! scope="row" | {{tlp|Lowercase title|dab{{=}}yes}} | Lowercase first character and place disambiguation in italics | iSpy (''Modern Family'') | [[ISpy (Modern Family)]] |- ! scope="row" | {{tlp|Italic title prefixed|17}} | Italicize after the number characters at the beginning of the title | German battleship ''Bismarck'' | [[:en:German battleship Bismarck|German battleship Bismarck]] |- ! scope="row" style="background-color: rgba(128, 128, 128, 0.5);" | [[Help:Magic words|Magic word]] ! scope="row" colspan="3" style="background-color: rgba(128, 128, 128, 0.5);" | |- ! scope="row" | {{[[mw:DISPLAYTITLE|DISPLAYTITLE:_NSAKEY]]}} | Various | _NSAKEY | [[:en:NSAKEY|NSAKEY]] |- ! scope="row" style="background-color: rgba(128, 128, 128, 0.5);" | Title corrections ! scope="row" colspan="3" style="background-color: rgba(128, 128, 128, 0.5);" | |- ! scope="row" | {{tlp|Correct title|reason{{=}}bracket}} | [[bracket|< > [ ] { }]] | Benzo[''a'']pyrene | [[:en:Benzo(a)pyrene|Benzo(a)pyrene]] |- ! scope="row" | {{tlp|Correct title|reason{{=}}#}} | [[Number sign|#]] | Pilot #5 || [[:en:Pilot No. 5|Pilot No. 5]] |- ! scope="row" | {{tlp|Correct title|reason{{=}}:}} | [[colon (punctuation)|:]] | DK: King of Swing | [[:en:DK King of Swing|DK King of Swing]] |} {{Documentation|content= [[Category:Correct title templates|Examples]] }}
